title: Alias, Order by and Distributed tables does not work properly together
description:
### Describe what's wrong
Order by used on a distributed table with an alias seems to shuffle the columns.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes -  v25.7.2
### How to reproduce
Table setup
```sql
CREATE TABLE shard_Test ON CLUSTER `{cluster}`
(
`a` String,
`b` Float64,
`c` Float64,
`d` Float64,
`e` Float64 ALIAS b + c,
`f` Float64 ALIAS c + d
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY a;
CREATE TABLE Test ON CLUSTER `{cluster}`
(
`a` String,
`b` Float64,
`c` Float64,
`d` Float64,
`e` Float64 ALIAS b + c,
`f` Float64 ALIAS c + d
)
ENGINE =  Distributed('{cluster}', 'default', 'shard_Test', rand());
INSERT INTO Test VALUES('a', 1,2,3);
```
Simple query
```sql
SELECT
e,
f
FROM Test
‚îå‚îÄe‚îÄ‚î¨‚îÄf‚îÄ‚îê
1. ‚îÇ 3 ‚îÇ 5 ‚îÇ
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¥‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
```
Query with order by
```sql
SELECT
e,
f
FROM Test
ORDER BY a ASC
‚îå‚îÄe‚îÄ‚î¨‚îÄf‚îÄ‚îê
1. ‚îÇ 5 ‚îÇ 3 ‚îÇ
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¥‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò

key_bug_features: Order by on distributed table with alias shuffles columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE shard_Test ON CLUSTER `{cluster}` ( `a` String, `b` Float64, `c` Float64, `d` Float64, `e` Float64 ALIAS b + c, `f` Float64 ALIAS c + d, `g` Nullable(Int32) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY a;

CREATE TABLE Test ON CLUSTER `{cluster}` ( `a` String, `b` Float64, `c` Float64, `d` Float64, `e` Float64 ALIAS b + c, `f` Float64 ALIAS c + d, `g` Nullable(Int32) ) ENGINE = Distributed('{cluster}', 'default', 'shard_Test', rand());
SELECT e, f FROM Test WHERE g IS NULL ORDER BY a ASC;
SELECT e, f FROM Test ORDER BY e DESC;
